1	/**
     2	 * Table-schema types for the project `database/<table>.json` files.
     3	 *
     4	 * A project owns its data as a set of JSON table schemas (table name = file
     5	 * basename). Each table and every column and relation carries a **required
     6	 * `description`** — the schema is the agent's mental model of the data, not just
     7	 * its shape — so the loader ({@link ./validate.ts}) fails loud when one is
     8	 * missing. These types describe the on-disk JSON exactly; the runtime row APIs
     9	 * live in {@link ./types.ts}.
    10	 */
    11	
    12	/** The primitive value kinds a column may hold. `json` is an arbitrary JSON-serialisable value. */
    13	export type ColumnType = 'string' | 'number' | 'boolean' | 'date' | 'json';
    14	
    15	/**
    16	 * How a column's value is auto-generated when a row is inserted without one.
    17	 * - `uuid` — a fresh unique id (recommended for the primary key).
    18	 * - `now`  — the current timestamp.
    19	 */
    20	export type GeneratedKind = 'uuid' | 'now';
    21	
    22	/**
    23	 * Referential action applied to this row when the referenced row is deleted.
    24	 * Mirrors the SQLite `FOREIGN KEY … ON DELETE` clause. Defaults to `restrict`.
    25	 */
    26	export type OnDelete = 'cascade' | 'setNull' | 'restrict';
    27	
    28	/** A foreign-key reference from a column to another table's column. */
    29	export interface ColumnReference {
    30	  /** The target table name (file basename, e.g. `feed_items`). */
    31	  table: string;
    32	  /** The target column; defaults to the target table's primary key. */
    33	  column?: string;
    34	  /** What happens to this row when the referenced row is deleted (default `restrict`). */
    35	  onDelete?: OnDelete;
    36	}
    37	
    38	/**
    39	 * One column in a table schema. `description` is mandatory (agent- and
    40	 * human-facing JSDoc source); all other fields are per-column flags.
    41	 */
    42	export interface ColumnSchema {
    43	  /** The column's value kind. */
    44	  type: ColumnType;
    45	  /** Required, human-readable description — the agent's mental model of this field. */
    46	  description: string;
    47	  /** Marks this column as the table's primary key. Exactly one column per table must set this. */
    48	  primaryKey?: boolean;
    49	  /** Whether a value must be supplied on insert (unless `default`/`generated` provides one). */
    50	  required?: boolean;
    51	  /** Whether values in this column must be unique across rows. */
    52	  unique?: boolean;
    53	  /** A literal default value used when none is supplied on insert. */
    54	  default?: unknown;
    55	  /** Auto-generate the value on insert (`uuid` or `now`). */
    56	  generated?: GeneratedKind;
    57	  /** A foreign-key reference to another table (real SQLite `FOREIGN KEY`). */
    58	  references?: ColumnReference;
    59	}
    60	
    61	/**
    62	 * A `belongsTo` relation — this table holds the foreign key pointing at a
    63	 * single row of the target table (the "one" side).
    64	 */
    65	export interface BelongsToRelation {
    66	  /** The target table this row belongs to. */
    67	  belongsTo: string;
    68	  /** The foreign-key column on THIS table that points at the target. */
    69	  via: string;
    70	  /** Required, human-readable description of the link. */
    71	  description: string;
    72	}
    73	
    74	/**
    75	 * A `hasMany` relation — the target table holds a foreign key pointing back at
    76	 * this table (the "many" side, expandable via `db.query(..., { include })`).
    77	 */
    78	export interface HasManyRelation {
    79	  /** The target table whose rows point back at this one. */
    80	  hasMany: string;
    81	  /** The foreign-key column on the TARGET table that points at this table. */
    82	  via: string;
    83	  /** Required, human-readable description of the link. */
    84	  description: string;
    85	}
    86	
    87	/**
    88	 * A navigable relation between tables. Discriminated by the presence of
    89	 * `belongsTo` (one side) vs `hasMany` (many side).
    90	 */

3:  * one schema".
4:  *
5:  * In the **agent** sandbox `db.*` is a **synchronous** host call (execShell-class;
6:  * fast local SQLite in the same process) — {@link DbApi}. On the **Node** side
7:  * (api/hook handlers) the same `db` is a **cross-thread proxy**, so every method
8:  * is `async` — {@link AsyncDbApi}, derived from `DbApi` so the two can never drift.
9:  * `libs/core` owns only these interfaces; `libs/cli` provides the `better-sqlite3`

27-## Top-level fields
28-
29-- **`title`** — a display title for the table `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/schema.ts#TableSchema`.
30-- **`description`** — required and fail-loud; a missing/blank one throws `<table>: table is missing required "description"` `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts#validateTableSchema`.
31-- **`columns`** — a required, non-empty map; a missing map or zero columns throws `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts:50-57`.
32:- **`relations`** — optional navigable links to other tables `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/schema.ts#TableSchema`.
33-
34-## Column fields
35-
36-Each column carries a required `type` and `description`; the rest are optional per-column flags `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/schema.ts#ColumnSchema`.
37-
38-| Field | Meaning |
39-|---|---|
40-| `type` | One of `string \| number \| boolean \| date \| json`; anything else throws `unknown column type` `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts#COLUMN_TYPES` `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts#validateColumn`. `date` is an ISO string, `json` an arbitrary JSON value `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/schema.ts:12-13`. |
41-| `description` | **Required** on every column; blank/missing throws `<table>.<col>: column is missing required "description"` `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts#validateColumn`. |
42-| `primaryKey` | Marks the primary key; **exactly one** column per table must set it, else `must have exactly one primaryKey column` throws `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts:59-69`. Emits `PRIMARY KEY` `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/store.ts#columnDefSql`. |
43-| `generated` | `uuid` or `now` — auto-fills the value on insert when none is supplied; any other kind throws `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts#GENERATED_KINDS` `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts#validateColumn`. Applied at insert time (`randomUUID()` / ISO `now`) `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/store.ts:358-363`. |
44-| `required` | Emits `NOT NULL` (skipped on the PK) `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/store.ts#columnDefSql`. |
--
51:Relations are declared under `relations`, discriminated by which key is present `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/schema.ts:120-128`. Both forms require `via` and a `description`, else the load throws `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts:71-89`.
52-
53-| Form | Meaning |
54-|---|---|
55-| `belongsTo` | This table holds the foreign key; `via` is the FK column on **this** table `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/schema.ts#BelongsToRelation`. |
56-| `hasMany` | The target table holds the FK back; `via` is the FK column on the **target** table — the "many" side expandable via `db.query(..., { include })` `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/schema.ts#HasManyRelation`. |
57-
58-`validateTableSchema` (called by the single-file writers) validates one table in isolation; cross-table resolution — a `references`/relation `via` naming an unknown table or column — is checked by `validateSchemaSet` over the full set at load `sdk/org/libs/core/src/db/validate.ts#validateSchemaSet`.
59-
60-## Drives `@app/types`
61-
62-The table set is compiled into a TS `interface` per table under `<projectRoot>/types/generated.d.ts` (the `@app/types` module) `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/build/schema.ts#generateAppTypes`. Each column maps by kind (`date→string`, `json→unknown`) `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/build/schema.ts#COLUMN_TS`; a `required` or `primaryKey` column is non-optional, everything else optional `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/build/schema.ts#renderRowInterface`; each field is JSDoc'd from its `description` `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/build/schema.ts#renderRowInterface`. Relations become typed fields (`hasMany` → `Target[]`, `belongsTo` → `Target`, both optional) `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/build/schema.ts:112-127`. The interface name PascalCases the basename and singularizes its last word (`feed_items` → `FeedItem`) `sdk/org/libs/cli/src/app/build/schema.ts:137-155`. Pages and handlers consume it as `import type { Article } from '@app/types'`.

The system prompt follows suit — `ask` is dropped from the yield list and **form components are omitted entirely** from an autonomous agent's prompt when `opts.omitAsk` is set `sdk/org/libs/core/src/context/system-block.ts:L140-L146` · `sdk/org/libs/core/src/context/system-block.ts:L328-L336`.
